title: Cacalia kuntzei
intro: Cacalia kuntzei, also known as Kunze's cacalia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Cacalia kuntzei include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and sesquiterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cacalia kuntzei is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into various other preparations, such as poultices and salves.
